rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EUGENE J. MALINOWSKI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/21/2021 at request of counsel. No further continuances will be granted without a court appearance. If proposed orders are e-filed the court will not get them and a hard copy must be dropped off. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 9/7/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THELMA M. THOMPSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Petition For Successor Administrator
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The executor, in his dual capacity as conservator of the estate of Roosevelt Thompson, continued to report 100% ownership of the Naples property as an asset of the conservatorship, after opening this probate in December 2018 to recognize Thelma Thompson's 50% interest in the Naples property. The Court has already ordered distribution of 100% ownership of the Naples property from Roosevelt Thompson's conservatorship estate to Alicia Thompson as administrator of Roosevelt Thompson's probate estate. At the hearing on the executor's status petition, the Court informed the executor's counsel that the executor would need to resign due to his conflict of interest. The Court also informed counsel that Alicia Thompson, owing a fiduciary duty to maximize the value of Roosevelt Thomson's estate, would not be a suitable candidate to take over administration of this estate. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HELGA MOLDENHAUER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/28/2021. 1) On GC-400 the follow boxes do not have the required information entered 1c. It also appears boxes 1a and 1b do not add up to what is listed on the I&A. 2) Please explain the following entry on Schedule C 11/4/2019 Kato, Feder & Suzuki/Filing Fee for $435.00. 3) Please explain and provide the date of the court order for the following entry on Schedule C 11/3/2019 Grant T. Tomioka/Independent Counsel for $2,660.00. 4) Please explain the following entry on Schedule C 8/16/2019 Martin W. Harris/Court accounting preparation (2nd (Final) Account: 3/1/19-5/25/2019). 5) Please explain the following entry on Schedule C 10/7/2019 Martin W. Harris/Court accounting preparation (Supplemental Account: 5/25/19-8/31/19). 6) The ending balance of assets in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. [LRSF 14.35 D.] 7) Please provide a legal basis for the request that "Petitioner not be required to file a supplemental accounting for the distribution of the reserve." See LRSF 14.41 The Court at its discretion may require a supplemental accounting of the reserve. 8) Please explain the legal basis for why the prayer and proposed order does not include in the distribution the language "and specifically programs that provide services to Cats" that is stated in Decedent's Will. This appears to need to be amended to conform to Decedent's Will. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 9/13/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JAMES P. RHEMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/21/21 . (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: The proof of service filed on 6/24/21 is incomplete at item 4 (date of mailing). The conservator does not disclose how or when she restored to either estate the many disbursements made from both this estate and the related trust estate. Neither accounting reflects these duplicate payments as liabilities of that estate. For a conservatorâs first account original statements must be filed to verify the beginning balance of cash accounts. [Probate Code Section 2620(c)(2).] The calculation of the bond at paragraph 10 (subtotal) is slightly off. The conservatorâs time entries reflect grocery shopping, although it appears that Gordon Fong was also reimbursed for groceries and is paid for caregivingâ¦ (Why so much wine?) Is the conservatee not entitled to any VA benefits (paragraph 11)? The CIU report indicates that he served in the Army, and he is now reportedly receiving visits from a home health nurse through the VA. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 9/10/21 . Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RHEMER TRUST DATED JULY 1, 2011 AS AMENDED AND RESTATED ON OCTOBER 31, 2013 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/21/21 . (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: The proof of service filed on 6/22/21 is incomplete at item 4 (date of mailing). The successor trustee does not disclose how or when she restored to either estate the many disbursements made from both this estate and the related conservatorship estate. Neither accounting reflects these duplicate payments as liabilities of that estate. A statement verifying the balance of the reverse mortgage must be filed. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 9/10/21 . Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

Although a copy of the supplement that amended the petition was served with the notice to the other heir, the published notice does not reflect that the petition was amended. As noted in the tentative ruling for 7/6/21, notice was to have been mailed and published AFTER the AMENDMENT was filed. Courtesy copies of an AMENDMENT to the petition, proof of service of the amendment and proof of publication of the petition and amendment must be received by the assigned Examiner by 9/2/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PAUL WISNYI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name and case number. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) Court to determine how to proceed. Petition For Probate Of Will And For Letters Testamentary [Filed 05/04/2021] 2) The 5/27/2021 Proof of Will in Lieu of Subscribing Witnesses says Ira R. Meyerowitz is unable to execute a proof of subscribing witness due to his current physical and mental incapacities. On 7/26/2021 a proof of subscribing witness statement signed by Ira Meyerwotirz was filed. Petition For Letters of Administration [Filed 7/26/2021] 4) Notice of the Petition for Letters of Administration was mailed 7/13/2021 prior to the petition being filed on 7/14/2021 (Date on filing on the petition is 7/7/2021 the date uploaded by petitioner).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF YAMILET DEL CARMEN GUTIERREZ-GONZALEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/28/2021. No response filed to the examiner notes. 1) Petitioner is not listed on page 4 under #8. Please provide the name, relationship to decedent, age, and address of Petitioner. 3) Please provide a legal basis for whether guardian ad litem needs to be appointed for the minor heirs. 4) Please provide a legal basis for the request for $10,000.00 in bond. It appears full bond should be required. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 9/13/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: TRUST FOR MICHAEL SWORDS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #14, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. the petition for settlement of the fourteenth account and status report of conservatee and approval of trustee and attorney fees filed by co-trustee is allowed as filed.
